name: Bibi Mansha Kaur & Prof. Piara Singh
body: At present, we do not have any biographical information regarding Bibi Mansha Kaur Ji or her husband, Professor Piara Singh Ji. If you possess any relevant information about them, we kindly request you to contact us. Thank you.
